FFmpeg source/license provenance (repository index)

Bundle builds stage backend-specific source/provenance notices as:

- bundle/vendor/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-SOURCE.txt

Backend-specific source files in this repository:

- ffmpeg-SOURCE-windows-x64.txt
- ffmpeg-SOURCE-ubuntu-x64.txt
- ffmpeg-SOURCE-macos-arm64.txt

Common references:

- FFmpeg upstream source repository: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
- LGPL text source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/master/COPYING.LGPLv2.1
